scope_note: QA Witt Tower Crash Pair Bounce Certificate [463]. Certifies the QA state (b=0 AND e=0) -- both consecutive days in bottom rank-bin of Z/27Z -- predicts positive next-day return. The (0,0) pair is an S-orbit member (0%9=0) but the signal is concentrated here; non-(0,0) S-orbit pairs are null (US perm_p=0.39, INTL perm_p=0.73). GLOBALLY VALIDATED: US 5/5 individually at p<0.01; INTL 6/6 individually significant (incl. EWC). MAPPING: daily log-return -> rank -> bin=floor(rank*27/N); b=bins[t-1], e=bins[t]; (0,0) state = both in extreme-low rank-bin. RESULT US (0,0): pooled n=131, mean=+1.46%, pos=62.6%, perm_p=0.0000. RESULT INTL (0,0): pooled n=161, mean=+1.90%, pos=68.9%, perm_p=0.0000. COMBINED n=292, mean~+1.70%. NON-(0,0) S-ORBIT NULL: US n=278, mean=+0.09%, perm_p=0.39; INTL n=350, mean=+0.05%, perm_p=0.73. EWC DISSOCIATION: EWC (0,0) significant (p=0.0000, mean=+2.12%) despite EWC a<=6 null in [462]; non-(0,0) S-orbit EWC days negative (p=0.005, mean=-0.48%), explaining cancellation. CERTIFIED: (C1) US pooled perm_p<0.001 PASS. (C2) INTL pooled perm_p<0.001 PASS. (C3) US mean>=1% PASS. (C4) INTL mean>=1% PASS. (C5) US 5/5 individually p<0.01 PASS. (C6) non-(0,0) S-orbit null in both regions PASS. Structural parents: cert [110], cert [458] (weekly S-orbit), cert [461] (daily a<=6 US), cert [462] (intl a<=6). Primary source: Fama EF (1970) doi:10.2307/2325486. Validated 2026-06-19.
